diagrams.title: Gram-Schmidt Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step transformation from input vectors to orthogonal then orthonormal set
elements: Step k: v_k = u_k - Σ proj
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the iterative construction of orthogonal vectors

diagrams.title: Projection Visualization
diagrams.description: Geometric interpretation of vector projection in 2D

diagrams.title: QR Decomposition Structure
diagrams.description: Matrix decomposition showing Q (orthonormal) and R (upper triangular)
elements: Matrix R (upper triangular with positive diagonal)
diagrams.purpose: Connect Gram-Schmidt to practical matrix decomposition
